greeting: Jordan and Mochi — NYC is ready for you. Here's everything you need for a perfect stay.
weather_summary: Warm and mostly sunny in New York — highs around 25°C (77°F). A brief shower possible Saturday afternoon, so pack a light rain layer.
packing_tips: Light rain jacket for Saturday — brief afternoon showers forecast
Mochi's leash and any medications — the hotel pet kit includes a bed and bowl
Comfortable sneakers — NYC is best explored on foot

events.name: NYC 5K Green Run
events.why_youll_love_it: A community run along the Hudson River — Mochi can join! Dog-friendly route flagged on the event page.

events.name: NYC Street Art Walking Tour
events.why_youll_love_it: Dog-friendly tour through Chelsea's famous street art scene. Marriott partner — $5 off with your confirmation number.

events.name: Central Park SummerStage
events.why_youll_love_it: Free outdoor concert in Central Park. Dogs on leash are welcome in most park areas.

dining.name: Halal Guys — Times Square
dining.note: 4-minute walk from the hotel. NYC institution. Open until 4 AM.

dining.name: Jollibee Times Square
dining.note: 2-minute walk. Halal chicken options available. Great for a quick meal.

dining.name: Cafe Boulud
dining.note: Award-winning French restaurant with halal-certified dishes available on request.

transit: Times Square is highly walkable. For the airport: take the AirTrain from JFK to Jamaica, then the E/J/Z train to Midtown — about 50 minutes and $10. Taxi is ~$70 and 45 minutes depending on traffic.
property_note: Mochi's pet kit (bed, bowl, waste bags) will be set up in your room before arrival. The Bryant Park Dog Run is a 7-minute walk — great for off-leash time.
pet_note: Pet-friendly floor confirmed. Pet fee of $75 has been added to your reservation. Nearest 24/7 vet: Central Park Veterinary Group, 1.8km away.
